description:
Goal: introduce compiler2-owned typed readers over quoted AnyValueRef roots for top-level/module/function surfaces so IndexCode, ScopeCode, DefineModule, and source identity live entirely on quoted source rather than Rc<Item> authority.

Grounding:
- src/compiler2/code.rs stores CodeState::Indexed { items: Vec<Rc<Item>>, attrs: Vec<Attribute> } and revisions compare Rc::ptr_eq over parsed items.
- src/compiler2/identity.rs stores ModuleSourceKind::Body { items: Vec<Rc<Item>> } and FunctionDef currently has no quoted-source carrier.
- src/compiler2/jobs/source.rs indexes, discovers modules, scopes aliases/imports/protocols/functions, and notes type refs by walking Item/FnDef directly.
- src/compiler2/frontdoor.rs and src/compiler2/source.rs now provide the compiler2-owned quoted-source substrate and parser front door.

Signal:
- Code/module/function source state stores rooted quoted source plus explicit source identity/fingerprint fields; Rc<Item> is not the canonical compiler2 source record.
- IndexCode, discover_modules, ScopeCode, DefineModule, and function surface indexing consume compiler2 typed readers over quoted roots.
- FunctionDefined revisioning keys off function source root identity plus relevant non-source metadata, not Rc::ptr_eq.
- Tests prove the source jobs publish the same surface facts from quoted roots and that replacing a function source root bumps function definition revision.

Change:
- add compiler2-owned typed quoted-source readers for top-level forms, module/protocol/defimpl bodies, function heads, attrs, and import/alias filters
- replace CodeState / ModuleSource / FunctionDef source authority fields with quoted-root carriers and source identity metadata
- rework source jobs and telemetry to consume/report quoted-source ids and revisions

Why:
- this is the seam where compiler2 stops pretending old parsed Rust AST is still the source of truth
- downstream phases can only be migrated honestly once the source/state layer is already authoritative
title: Compiler2 quoted source readers: replace Rc<Item> source authority
